rationale.root_cause: The response never mentions line 743, the FLIP opcode, or any defect in be_vm.c; it instead invents an unrelated crash involving be_pcall, fval, and be_dofunc.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested edits (removing fval from be_dofunc or be_execprotected calls) bear no resemblance to the required patch that changes -a->v.i to ~a->v.i inside the FLIP case.
rationale.global_fix: No explanation of the actual root cause (copy-paste error using arithmetic negation instead of bitwise complement for the FLIP operator on integers) is provided; the discussion of undefined argc/fval is irrelevant.
